overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through Night City at dusk, descending into an industrial waterway beneath highway overpasses, and returning to street level. The environment features neon-lit skyscrapers, concrete infrastructure, and futuristic urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial sidewalk with neon advertising

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk following an NPC pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive clothing walking ahead of ego toward the stairwell entrance

entered.detail: tall black metal security fence running along the left side of the sidewalk
large illuminated advertisement displaying a female model on the building facade
palm tree in concrete planter on the sidewalk median
distinctive high-rise building with a large archway opening visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a futuristic city sidewalk at dusk, following an NPC pedestrian. Neon billboards and palm trees line the path, with a distinctive arched skyscraper visible in the distance. A black iron fence runs along the left side while sparse traffic moves on the road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell descending to industrial drainage

events.description: turns left away from sidewalk toward stairwell entrance leading downward
begins descending concrete stairs into the industrial waterway below street level

agents.ego_description: navigating down concrete stairs into a lower industrial area beneath the city

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings descending into the waterway
dark water filling the industrial canal at the bottom of the stairs
large beige cylindrical pipes running horizontally along the waterway walls
rough concrete walls enclosing the stairwell and waterway

segments.scene_description: The character turns left and descends a concrete stairwell into an industrial waterway beneath the city. The environment transitions from the neon-lit street to a darker, enclosed space with concrete walls and large cylindrical pipes visible near the water surface below.

events.description: reaches the water level and begins walking through the flooded industrial canal

agents.ego_description: wading through the shallow water of the industrial canal beneath highway overpasses

entered.detail: massive concrete dam-like structures with stepped surfaces and drainage outlets
curved elevated highway overpass spanning across the waterway above

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the flooded industrial waterway, surrounded by massive concrete spillway structures and large cylindrical pipes. Overhead highway ramps curve above the canal while the character wades through the dark water toward the distant stairs.

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to exit the waterway
exits the stairwell back to street level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to return to street level

entered.detail: metal pipe railing along the left side of the ascending stairs
opening at the top of the stairs leading back to the urban street

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the concrete stairs from the waterway, gripping the metal handrail while moving toward the street exit above. The industrial pipes and water recede below as the character approaches the opening back to the city street.

events.description: crosses the road at a yellow striped crosswalk while cars pass by

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and crossing the road at a crosswalk, then continuing along a waterfront promenade

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing standing by the waterfront railing looking down at the lower level

entered.detail: multi-story commercial building covered in bright neon advertisements and digital screens
elevated highway ramps and support columns visible in the background
concrete and metal railing along the edge of an elevated walkway overlooking water
commercial area with illuminated shop fronts visible on a lower level below the street

segments.scene_description: Back at street level, the character walks past neon-lit buildings and crosses a busy road at a yellow crosswalk. The scene transitions to a waterfront promenade with palm trees and a railing overlooking a lower commercial area, where another pedestrian stands looking down at the shops below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant neon-lit city sidewalk down into a dark industrial waterway and back up to a bustling waterfront promenade. It begins by following a pedestrian past palm trees and glowing billboards toward a distant arched skyscraper, before turning left to descend a concrete stairwell. As the character drops below street level, the bright city lights fade into a dim, enclosed space where the camera moves through a flooded canal surrounded by massive concrete spillways and overhead highway ramps. The scene then shifts as the character grips a metal handrail to ascend the stairs, leaving the industrial pipes and dark water behind to emerge once more into the urban light. Finally, the camera crosses a busy road at a yellow crosswalk and opens onto a waterfront promenade overlooking a commercial district.
